title: Make it possible to Export "Write Updates Via Email" for all board items
excerpt: I would like to be able to export my board items and be prompt an option to include the link for each item that allows updates for each item. So when I say Export Board to Excel in addition to the three options provided …

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to export my board items and be prompt an option to include the link for each item that allows updates for each item. So when I say Export Board to Excel in addition to the three options provided (Included Updates, Include Subitems, Send copy to email) it would be great to have an option to include the Item email address making it easier for me to allow outside stakeholders email updates to their requests.
